notes: MediaMarkt e-commerce homepage. Search bar, account/login link, shopping cart, category navigation bar, product deal tiles, newsletter signup, extensive footer. The 'Form (1 fields)' was a phantom duplicate of the search form. Model detects 8 endpoints here, performing well.

endpoints.label: Account Login
endpoints.description: Mein Konto / Anmelden link in header

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Warenkorb icon in header linking to basket

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Category nav bar: Computer & Buero, TV & Audio, Smartphone & Tarife, Gaming & VR, Angebote, OUTLET%

endpoints.label: Newsletter Signup
endpoints.description: Email newsletter subscription form in the lower section of the page

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Extensive footer: service links, payment methods, legal info, store locator

endpoints.label: Store Locator
endpoints.description: Markt waehlen button in header to select local MediaMarkt store for pickup/availability
